verses.text: Damaskas tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: En un, Damaskas pen khuapi hi nawnloin ninbulomtang suak ding hi
Ama khuapite kinusiacip paisuak ding hi. Tuuhonte' omna mun suak ding a, tua tuuhonte lum hithiatin bangmah in lausak lo ding hi
Efraim gam panin kulhpi bei-in, Damaskas khua panin kumpi gam mangthang ding hi. Syria mi a suakta laite pen Israel mite mah bangin mindai ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi.
Tua ni ciangin Jakob' liatna bei ding a, ama hauhna khempeuh mangthang ding hi

An a la mi in ankung ding laite kaikhawmin ante a kilak khit ciangin leitang a hawm guakin a om tawh kibang ding a, mi khat in Refaim Kuam sungah ansang a kaihkhop khit ciangin lolai a hawm guakin a om tawh zong kibang ding hi
Oliv kung a kisin' khit ciangin a hiang sangpen dawnah pum nih pum thum singkung hiang dawnah pum li pum nga a omlai tawh kibang lel ding hi, Israel-te' Topa Pasian in ci hi
Tua ni ciangin mite in amaute a Bawlpa pi ngaihsut ding uh a, amaute' mit in Israel-te' Siangtho Pa en ding uh hi
Amaute in amau khut tawh a bawlsa uh biakna taute donlo ding uh a, amau' bawlsa Asherah milimte hita leh paknamtui halna biakna taute hita leh muan'in nei nawnlo ding uh hi
Tua ni ciangin amau' khuapi muan'huaite pen Hiv mite leh Amor mite in Israel mite' hangin a nusiat uh munte tawh kibang ding a, gamkhing a suak ding hi
Nomau hong honkhia Pasian note in mangngilhin, nomau' belh Suangpi phawklo na hih manun note in biakna huan bawlin kung hoihte suan a, kung namdangte tawh pehin
tuate na suan' ni mahun thakhatin khang a, na tuh ni uh a zing ciang mahin a hong pak hangin note in a gah na lokha kei ding uh hi. Gimna leh lungkhamna hong tun' ni-in tuate maimang ding hi
Ah, mi tampite' kikona, tuipi ging bang! Ah, minamte' otna, tui lianpi ging bang

Tui lianpi a ging bangin minamte awng uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in amaute tai ding a, gamlapi pekah amaute taikhia ding uh hi. Mualtunga huih mai-ah ansi leeng bang leh huihpi mai-a pingpei bangin leengkhia mang ding uh hi
En un, nitakin hong lausak a, zingsang ma-in amaute beita! Hih bang thute pen eite hong susia-in eite a hong luhgawpte in a thuak ding uh ahi hi.
